title: HELIX: HEOM Library for Integrated eXecution
description: HELIX (HEOM Library for Integrated eXecution) is a C++17 / CUDA implementation of the hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) for GPU-accelerated simulations of non-Markovian open quantum systems. It exposes the validated legacy spin-glass CUDA path through a public C++ API and ships with a numerical baseline that protects the physical observables across refactors. HELIX targets cuBLAS / cuSPARSE on modern NVIDIA GPUs and is being prepared as an embeddable HEOM backend for higher-level quantum simulation stacks.
